translation_text: Yet still his female feebleness maintains;
translation_text_raw: Yet still his female feebleness maintains;

translation_text: As to one channel flow the many drains,
translation_text_raw: As to one channel flow the many drains,

translation_text: All come to him, yea, all beneath the sky.
translation_text_raw: All come to him, yea, all beneath the sky.

translation_text: Thus he the constant excellence retains; The simple child again, free from all stains. Who knows how white attracts,
translation_text_raw: Thus he the constant excellence retains; The simple child again, free from all stains. Who knows how white attracts,

translation_text: Yet always keeps himself within black's shade,
translation_text_raw: Yet always keeps himself within black's shade,

translation_text: Displayed in view of all beneath the sky;
translation_text_raw: Displayed in view of all beneath the sky;

translation_text: He in the unchanging excellence arrayed,
translation_text_raw: He in the unchanging excellence arrayed,

translation_text: Endless return to man's first state has made.
translation_text_raw: Endless return to man's first state has made.

translation_text: Who knows how glory shines, Yet loves disgrace, nor ever for it is pale;
translation_text_raw: Who knows how glory shines, Yet loves disgrace, nor ever for it is pale;

translation_text: Behold his presence in a spacious vale,
translation_text_raw: Behold his presence in a spacious vale,

translation_text: To which men come from all beneath the sky.
translation_text_raw: To which men come from all beneath the sky.

translation_text: The unchanging excellence completes its tale;
translation_text_raw: The unchanging excellence completes its tale;

translation_text: The simple infant man in him we hail.
translation_text_raw: The simple infant man in him we hail.

translation_text: The unwrought material, when divided and distributed, forms vessels.
translation_text_raw: The unwrought material, when divided and distributed, forms vessels.

translation_text: The sage, when employed, becomes the Head of all the Officers (of government);
translation_text_raw: The sage, when employed, becomes the Head of all the Officers (of government);

translation_text: and in his greatest regulations he employs no violent measures.
translation_text_raw: and in his greatest regulations he employs no violent measures.
